Mobile Detailing Columbia SC: The Complete 2026 Price & Service Guide

By Mikah Albertson — updated 2026-03-20

Why Columbia SC Residents Choose Mobile Detailing

Life in Columbia SC is busy. Between work, family, and everything in between, finding time to drive across town and sit in a waiting room for a car detail just isn't realistic for most people. That's exactly why mobile detailing Columbia SC has become the preferred choice for vehicle owners throughout the Midlands.

With Mikah's Mobile Detailing, you don't go to us — we come to you. We arrive at your home, apartment, or office with everything needed to perform a full professional detail: water, power, equipment, and products. All you provide is a parking spot. Whether you're working from home in Shandon or parked at your office downtown, we work around your schedule.

Beyond the convenience, mobile detailing delivers the same — and often better — quality than traditional detail shops. Without the overhead of a fixed location, we invest in premium products and can give your vehicle dedicated one-on-one attention rather than rushing through a high-volume shop floor. Explore our full mobile detailing services to see exactly what we bring to every appointment.

Mobile Detailing Packages for Columbia SC (2026 Prices)

We keep our pricing simple and transparent. No surprise charges, no add-on pressure. Here's what we offer for mobile detailing in Columbia SC in 2026:

Package Price What's Included Time
Basic Detail From $225 Exterior hand wash, wheel & tire cleaning, tire dressing, window cleaning, interior vacuum, dashboard wipe-down, door jambs 2–3 hrs
Factory Reset From $400 Everything in Basic + clay bar treatment, hand wax, interior steam cleaning, leather conditioning, stain removal, odor treatment, trim restoration 4–5 hrs
Ceramic Coating Custom Quote Full paint decontamination, paint correction prep, professional ceramic coating application, 2–5 year protection, hydrophobic finish Full day
Paint Correction Custom Quote Single or multi-stage correction, swirl and scratch removal, oxidation removal, gloss enhancement, finishing polish Full day

SUVs, trucks, and large vans carry a small upsize fee. Vehicles with heavy soiling, pet hair, or long-neglected interiors may require a condition surcharge. We'll always give you an accurate quote before we start. See full details on our pricing page.

Columbia SC Service Areas & Neighborhoods

Our mobile detailing team covers all of Columbia SC and the surrounding Midlands region. Here's where we regularly work:

Downtown Columbia — We detail cars in parking garages, surface lots, and driveways throughout the city center. Great for professionals who want their vehicle done while they're in the office.

Five Points — A popular neighborhood for mobile detailing. We work around street parking and private driveways to fit your schedule.

The Vista — Condo and apartment residents love our mobile service since they don't need to leave the area. We handle the logistics.

Shandon — One of our most requested neighborhoods. Tree-lined streets and busy households make mobile detailing the smart choice here.

Forest Acres — We serve Forest Acres regularly, including homes near Trenholm Road and residents near Fort Jackson.

Two Notch Road corridor — High traffic area with lots of SUVs and work trucks. We handle everything from quick refreshes to full factory resets along this corridor.

Harbison — Northwest Columbia's busiest commercial and residential zone. We detail vehicles at homes, office parks, and retail parking lots throughout Harbison.

Northeast Columbia — Families and commuters in NE Columbia use our mobile service to get their vehicles detailed without disrupting busy schedules.

Spring Valley — Luxury and high-end vehicles are common in Spring Valley, and our paint correction and ceramic coating services are popular with residents here.

We also serve Lexington, Irmo, West Columbia, Cayce, Blythewood, and surrounding areas. Not sure if we cover your location? Call us and we'll confirm.

What to Expect From Your Mobile Detail Appointment

Booking a mobile detail in Columbia SC is straightforward. Here's exactly how it works:

Step 1 — Schedule. Call or text (803) 667-8731, or book online. We'll confirm your package, location, and an arrival window. Same-day bookings are available when the schedule allows.

Step 2 — We arrive fully equipped. Mikah's Mobile Detailing brings everything needed: a water tank, generator (if needed), vacuum, steam cleaner, polisher, and a full kit of professional-grade products. You don't need to be home the entire time — just accessible by phone.

Step 3 — We get to work. Our process follows a strict order of operations — exterior before interior, decontamination before correction, protection last — to deliver consistent, high-quality results every time.

Step 4 — Final walkthrough. We inspect every surface before we leave and walk you through what was done. If anything isn't right, we fix it on the spot.

What you need to provide: Just a parking spot with reasonable access around the vehicle. A driveway, parking garage space, or street spot works fine. We bring our own water supply so you don't even need a hose hookup.

Most Basic appointments are complete in under 3 hours. Factory Reset packages typically take 4–5 hours. We'll give you an accurate window at booking so your day isn't left open-ended.

Mobile Detailing vs. Drop-Off Detail Shops in Columbia

When comparing mobile detailing Columbia SC to traditional drop-off shops, the differences are significant for most vehicle owners:

Factor Mobile Detailing (Mikah's) Drop-Off Detail Shop
Convenience We come to you — home or office You drive to them, arrange a ride, wait or leave
Time Cost Zero commute time; work while we detail Drop-off + pickup adds 30–90 min to your day
Personal Attention One detailer focused entirely on your vehicle Often high-volume; multiple vehicles at once
Price From $225 — competitive with shops Comparable, but overhead costs can be higher
Quality Control Owner-operated; your satisfaction is our reputation Varies by staff and shop volume
Reviews 5-star rated on Google Varies widely

For most Columbia SC residents, mobile detailing simply makes more sense. You get professional results delivered to your location without rearranging your day. Read what our customers say on our reviews page.

Call or text (803) 667-8731 to schedule your appointment. Same-day availability when the schedule allows. All packages include a satisfaction guarantee — if something isn't right, we make it right.

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does mobile detailing cost in Columbia SC?

Mobile detailing in Columbia SC starts at $225 for our Basic package. Our most popular Factory Reset detail is $400 and includes a full interior and exterior service. Ceramic coating and paint correction packages are priced by quote based on your vehicle's size and condition. All prices are all-inclusive — no hidden fees.

Do you come to my home or office for mobile detailing in Columbia SC?

Yes! That's the whole point of mobile detailing. We bring our professional equipment, water supply, and products directly to your home, apartment complex, office, or wherever your vehicle is parked. All you need to provide is a parking spot — we handle everything else.

How long does a mobile detail appointment take in Columbia SC?

A Basic detail typically takes 2–3 hours. Our Factory Reset package runs 4–5 hours. Paint correction and ceramic coating appointments can take a full day. We'll give you an accurate time estimate when you book so you can plan accordingly.

Do you offer same-day mobile detailing in Columbia SC?

Yes, same-day availability is offered when the schedule allows. Contact us before noon and we can often fit you in the same day for Basic or Factory Reset packages throughout Columbia and surrounding areas. Call (803) 667-8731 to check current availability.

What areas do you serve for mobile detailing near Columbia SC?

We serve all of Columbia SC and the greater Midlands area including Downtown Columbia, Five Points, The Vista, Shandon, Forest Acres, Harbison, Northeast Columbia, Spring Valley, Irmo, Lexington, West Columbia, Blythewood, and Cayce. If you're unsure whether we cover your zip code, give us a call.
